master_summary: Multiple red flags: credit gates, cycle peak, valuations extreme

checklist.text: Private credit gates lifted / default rate < 5%
Phil Anderson: post-2026 peak confirmed + 6–12 months
RBA pivot to cuts (currently hiking — rate at 4.10%)
S&P 500 golden cross restored (50d back above 200d)
BTC Fear & Greed back above 60 (see live data above)
AI robotics commercial deployment confirmed (Agility/BD shipping)
AU–US critical minerals framework signed ($8.5B pipeline)

crypto_action: No new positions until F&G recovers above 50 or oil drops below $90. BTC $65K = starter entry signal. ETH, XRP, SOL — stand aside.

crypto_signals.ETH: Underperforming BTC. ETF inflows stalled. Needs macro catalyst.
crypto_signals.XRP: SEC clarity long priced in. No fresh catalyst.
crypto_signals.SOL: Meme volume collapsed. High beta = high pain in risk-off.

sections.title: Market Health
sections.action: Stay defensive. No new long equity positions. Cash and short-duration bonds only. Private credit gates are the new canary — this isn't valuation noise anymore.

items.label: Buffett Indicator
items.note: Long-term fair value ~120%. Only 3rd time in 60 years at this level.

items.label: Shiller CAPE Ratio
items.note: Only two times in history above 40 — the other was dot-com peak.

items.label: Private Credit Stress
items.sub: Blackstone BCRED gated · BlackRock HPS limited
items.note: $265B exposure. Redemption queues 3–5 quarters. Record high default rate.

items.label: Berkshire / Abel
items.sub: Greg Abel CEO Jan 2026 · Cut Apple to $60B · Sold BofA
items.note: Largest cash hoard ever. Loudest possible wait signal.

items.label: Ray Dalio / Bridgewater
items.sub: Fortune interview Mar 16 · Stage 5 Big Cycle · Capital wars
items.note: AI boom 'more dangerous' phase. AIA Labs hit $5B AUM.

items.label: Howard Marks / Oaktree
items.sub: Bloomberg Mar 17–18 · 'Is It a Bubble?' memo
items.note: Now sees AI as full labour replacement. 'Shaken' by implications. New memo weeks away.

items.label: Jeremy Grantham / GMO
items.sub: U.S. equities 2σ above real price trend
items.note: AI bubble = great tech → great bubble pattern. Profit plunge forecast.

sections.title: Key People — Cycle Theorists
sections.action: All three land cycle theorists in unison on 2026 peak. No new Australian or US real estate positions. Watch Harrison's 'food vs mortgage' indicator — residential mortgage default spike = cycle confirmation.

items.label: Phil Anderson
items.note: Housing stocks rolling over, BTC speculation, banking deregulation — all classic peak signals.

items.label: Fred Harrison
items.note: Binary choice approaching: mortgage vs food. When supermarket wins → market collapses.

items.label: Akhil Patel
items.note: Three independent signals from three theorists — same endpoint.

items.label: Jeremy Grantham
items.note: Great innovations → great bubbles. AI deflation = profit plunge + valuation decline.

sections.title: AI Robotics
sections.action: Sector confirmed commercial — not hype. Agility and Boston Dynamics shipping. VC up 300% YoY. Hold listed proxies (NVDA, Tesla, robotics ETFs). Watch Figure AI IPO as next catalyst.

items.label: Tesla Optimus
items.note: V3 production summer 2026. External sales late 2026. 'Digital Optimus' (Tesla×xAI) announced Mar 11.

items.label: Figure AI
items.note: Largest humanoid raise to date. Nvidia backing = inference-at-edge signal.

items.label: Apptronik
items.note: Apollo deployed at Mercedes & GXO. Investors: John Deere, Qatar Investment Authority, AT&T Ventures.

items.label: Boston Dynamics Atlas
items.sub: Electric Atlas unveiled CES 2026 · DeepMind partnership
items.note: First units to Hyundai RMAC + Google DeepMind. Customer deployments 2027.

items.label: Agility Robotics (Digit)
items.sub: Toyota Canada RAV4 plant · 7 units live · RaaS model
items.note: First commercial humanoid deployment in Canadian automotive manufacturing.

items.label: 1X Technologies (NEO)
items.sub: World's first consumer humanoid · $499/mo sub · Deliveries 2026
items.note: Preorders live. Consumer market for humanoids opens.

sections.title: Energy & Materials
sections.action: Oil $119+ is the macro wildcard — complicates Fed pivot and crypto/equities. Hold NEE and BE (structural demand locked in). Lithium/copper: accumulate on any macro selloff, not now. Rare earths: watch NRF government plays.

items.label: NextEra Energy (NEE)
items.sub: Duane Arnold restart w/ Google (25yr PPA) · 20 GW DC pipeline
items.note: Half of 20 GW data centre pipeline in advanced discussions. Online 2028+.

items.label: Bloom Energy (BE)
items.note: Revenue guidance $3.1–3.3B. Q4 revenue $777M (+36% YoY). Stretched — hold, don't add.

items.label: Lithium
items.sub: Down 80% from peak · Demand +30% 2024 · 16% growth fcst 2026
items.note: Supply adequate near-term; deficits expected medium-term. Accumulate on dips.

items.label: Copper
items.sub: Declining ore grades + extended dev timelines
items.note: Structural multi-decade deficit. Long copper = long electrification.

items.label: Rare Earths
items.sub: Top 3 regions control 86% refining (up from 82% in 2020)
items.note: AU–US framework directly targeting this. Strategic not financial play near-term.

sections.title: Australia
sections.action: Sydney/Melbourne at/near cycle peak with RBA still hiking — worst combo for leveraged property. Brisbane/Adelaide/Perth still have momentum but window closing. Critical minerals bilateral deals are a multi-year tailwind.

items.label: Sydney (Houses)
items.note: Cycle peak forming. RBA hiking into stagnant prices = squeeze.

items.label: Melbourne (Houses)
items.note: Underperformer for 3 years. Affordability better but demand weak.

items.label: Brisbane (Houses)
items.note: Strongest major capital. But cycle peak approaching — window closing.

items.label: RBA Cash Rate
items.sub: Split vote 5-4 · May hike to 4.35% likely
items.note: CPI 3.8%. Housing +6.8%, electricity +32.2% (rebates exhausted).

items.label: AU–US Critical Minerals
items.note: Rare earths + critical minerals. Biggest bilateral deal in sector.

items.label: National Reconstruction Fund
items.note: Deployment still slow. Watch for further equity investments Q2 2026.

summary_rows.key: See live data above · F&G 26 · FOMC headwinds
